evals.name: trace-auth-flow
evals.prompt: how does authentication work in this project? trace the flow from the login endpoint through middleware to session creation — I just joined the team and need to understand it
evals.expected_output: Should use codebase-search as primary tool for broad architectural question, then Read for context on key files.

assertions.text: Uses codebase-search as the primary tool
Writes a natural language query, not keywords
assertions.description: Should use a descriptive question like 'How does the authentication flow work from login to session creation?' not 'auth login session'

assertions.text: Follows up with Read to get full context on discovered files
assertions.description: After codebase-search surfaces relevant files, should Read them for complete understanding

assertions.text: Does not start with 20+ Grep calls
assertions.description: Skill rule: start broad with codebase-search, then drill down — do not start with many Grep calls

evals.name: find-structural-pattern
evals.prompt: find all React useEffect calls with empty dependency arrays across the project — those are likely causing unnecessary re-renders on every update
evals.expected_output: Should use ast-grep with a pattern matching useEffect(() => ..., []) structure.

assertions.text: Uses ast-grep for structural pattern matching
Pattern targets useEffect with empty deps array
Does not fall back to codebase-search for a structural query
assertions.description: This is a structural code pattern (AST shape), not a conceptual question — ast-grep is the right tool

evals.name: find-import-string
evals.prompt: find every file that imports from @company/legacy-utils — we're migrating off that package and I need a full list
evals.expected_output: Should use Grep for a known string pattern match, not codebase-search or ast-grep.

assertions.text: Uses Grep tool for the search
assertions.description: This is a known string pattern '@company/legacy-utils' — Grep is the right tool per the decision rule

assertions.text: Searches for the exact import string
assertions.description: Pattern should match '@company/legacy-utils' or similar import statement

assertions.text: Does not use codebase-search for a simple string match
assertions.description: Skill says: 'Can you write the grep pattern? Use Grep.' This is a straightforward string match
